examples: The doctors revived the comatose man

meanings.definition: give new life or energy to
examples: A hot soup will revive me

meanings.definition: be brought back to life, consciousness, or strength
restore from a depressed, inactive, or unused state
examples: He revived this style of opera
He resurrected the tango in this remote part of Argentina
She revived after the doctor gave her an injection

meanings.definition: restored to consciousness or life or vigor
given fresh life or vigor or spirit
